from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import functions as F

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk"
    server = "pins-sql-peas-primary-training.database.windows.net"
    database = "pins-sqldb-peas-training"
    akv_name = "pins-kv-peas-training"
    secret_name = "peas-sql-app-connection-string"

elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz"
    server = "pins-sql-peas-primary-dev.database.windows.net"
    database = "pins-sqldb-peas-dev"
    akv_name = "pinskvsynwodwdevuks"
    secret_name = "mpesc-sql-password"

else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace '{workspace}'")

BASE_PATH = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net"

CASE_OFFICER_PATH = f"{BASE_PATH}/MPESC-EXTRACT/Case Officer.csv"
CASES_PATH = f"{BASE_PATH}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"
OUT_PATH = f"{BASE_PATH}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/User/case_officer_case_map"

url = (
    f"jdbc:sqlserver://{server}:1433;"
    f"database={database};"
    "encrypt=true;"
    "trustServerCertificate=false;"
    "hostNameInCertificate=*.database.windows.net;"
    "loginTimeout=30;"
)

secret_value = mssparkutils.credentials.getSecret(akv_name, secret_name)

if secret_name == "peas-sql-app-connection-string":
    parts = {
        kv.split("=", 1)[0].strip().lower(): kv.split("=", 1)[1].strip()
        for kv in secret_value.split(";")
        if "=" in kv
    }
    sql_user = parts.get("user id") or parts.get("uid") or parts.get("user")
    sql_password = parts.get("password") or parts.get("pwd")

    if not sql_user:
        raise ValueError(f"User ID not found in {secret_name} (KV={akv_name})")
    if not sql_password:
        raise ValueError(f"Password not found in {secret_name} (KV={akv_name})")
else:
    sql_user = "peas_app_ZXzkE0vP"
    sql_password = secret_value

def nullify_str(col):
    c = F.trim(col.cast("string"))
    return (
        F.when(col.isNull(), None)
         .when(c == "", None)
         .when(F.lower(c).isin("null", "none", "undefined", "nan"), None)
         .otherwise(c)
    )

case_officer_df = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(CASE_OFFICER_PATH)
)

cases_df = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(CASES_PATH)
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("Case ID").cast("string")).alias("caseNodeId"),
        F.col("GUID").cast("string").alias("caseId")
    )
    .filter(F.col("caseNodeId").isNotNull() & F.col("caseId").isNotNull())
    .dropDuplicates(["caseNodeId"])
)

existing_users = (
    spark.read.format("jdbc")
    .option("url", url)
    .option("query", """
        SELECT
            CAST(id AS varchar(36)) AS userId,
            CAST(legacyId AS varchar(255)) AS legacyId
        FROM dbo.[User]
        WHERE legacyId IS NOT NULL
    """)
    .option("user", sql_user)
    .option("password", sql_password)
    .load()
    .withColumn("legacyId", F.trim(F.col("legacyId")))
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyId"])
)

case_officer_clean = (
    case_officer_df
    .select(
        nullify_str(F.col("caseOfficerId")).alias("legacyId"),
        nullify_str(F.col("CaseNodeId")).alias("caseNodeId")
    )
    .filter(F.col("legacyId").isNotNull() & F.col("caseNodeId").isNotNull())
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyId", "caseNodeId"])
)

case_officer_case_map = (
    case_officer_clean.alias("co")
    .join(
        existing_users.alias("u"),
        F.col("co.legacyId") == F.col("u.legacyId"),
        "inner"
    )
    .join(
        cases_df.alias("c"),
        F.col("co.caseNodeId") == F.col("c.caseNodeId"),
        "inner"
    )
    .select(
        F.col("c.caseId").alias("caseId"),
        F.col("u.userId").alias("caseOfficerId"),
        F.col("co.legacyId").alias("legacyId")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["caseId", "caseOfficerId", "legacyId"])
)

display(case_officer_case_map.limit(50))

print("case_officer_case_map rows:", case_officer_case_map.count())
print("distinct caseId:", case_officer_case_map.select("caseId").distinct().count())
print("distinct caseOfficerId:", case_officer_case_map.select("caseOfficerId").distinct().count())

co_case_check = (
    case_officer_clean.alias("co")
    .join(
        cases_df.alias("c"),
        F.col("co.caseNodeId") == F.col("c.caseNodeId"),
        "left"
    )
    .select(
        F.col("co.caseNodeId"),
        F.col("co.legacyId"),
        F.col("c.caseId"),
        F.when(F.col("c.caseId").isNotNull(), F.lit("matched_case"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("missing_case"))
         .alias("case_status")
    )
)

display(
    co_case_check
    .orderBy("case_status", "caseNodeId", "legacyId")

cases_csv_check = (
    cases_df.alias("c")
    .join(
        case_officer_case_map.alias("m"),
        F.col("c.caseId") == F.col("m.caseId"),
        "left"
    )
    .select(
        F.col("c.caseNodeId"),
        F.col("c.caseId"),
        F.col("m.caseOfficerId"),
        F.col("m.legacyId"),
        F.when(F.col("m.caseId").isNotNull(), F.lit("in_final_map"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("missing_from_final_map"))
         .alias("status")
    )
)

display(
    cases_csv_check
    .orderBy("status", "caseNodeId")

OUT_PATH = f"{BASE_PATH}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/User/case_officer_case_map"

(
    case_officer_case_map
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(OUT_PATH)
)

print("Wrote case officer case map to:", OUT_PATH)
print("Rows written:", case_officer_case_map.count())

display(case_officer_case_map.limit(50))
